cleavage agent: digested overnight at 37 °C with trypsin (Promega, V5280)
collision energy: 3 s data-dependent MS/MS scans in an ion routing multipole at 30% normalized collision energy (HCD)
enrichment method: we tried to study the interactome of endogenous ALKBH7 through IP-MS/MS.
instrument: the Thermo Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer
labeling: identified the differentially expressed proteins (DEPs) in these cell lines by TMT-based MS/MS.
reduction reagent: the lysates were then reduced by incubation with 5 mM DTT at 60 °C for 1 h.
reduction concentration: the lysates were then reduced by incubation with 5 mM DTT at 60 °C for 1 h.
